articles.title: Home of the Week: Built in 2026, a modern three-bedroom condo in Newton for $1.6m
articles.description:
The unit has a private outdoor patio

The post Home of the Week: Built in 2026, a modern three-bedroom condo in Newton for $1.6m appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Explore a modern three-bedroom condo in Newton listed for $1.6 million.
The condo features a private outdoor patio for residents' enjoyment.
This property reflects the growing luxury real estate market in the Boston area.
